---
title: "The Rev. Charles Kingsley"
---

## The Rev. Charles Kingsley

**Dates:** (1819-75)

### Description

novelist and social reformer

### Biography

[ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from December 8, 1896.
- Letter from May 22d 1889
- Letter from March 28th 1867
- Letter from July 6 1866
- Letter from Oct 4 1864
- Letter from Novr 26th 1862

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
